1) **Restart/build status:** ✅ Gateway was manually restarted successfully, and the latest Telegram image-intake changes were already built/validated earlier (`npm run build` passed, `tsc` exit 0).

2) **What changed (high level):** The Telegram channel now supports inbound **photos + image documents** end-to-end, normalizes caption/media handling, routes image context into `handleChat` (`INBOUND_TELEGRAM_IMAGE`), improves download/error handling, and keeps session/journaling behavior intact.

3) **What should I verify next?** I can now run the post-restart checks you requested—do you want me to validate **`/status` first** in Telegram, then a **normal text chat reply** flow right after?
